Now, let's create the `+page.svelte` for the Registration page. This will be a multi-step form allowing users to register as a Customer, Expert, or Supplier.

File: `gefifi-2/src/frontend/src/routes/auth/register/+page.svelte`
Content:

```svelte
<!-- gefifi-2/src/frontend/src/routes/auth/register/+page.svelte -->
<script lang="ts">
	import { goto } from '$app/navigation';
	import { authStore, type RegisterUserData, type AuthUser } from '$lib/stores/auth';
	import apiClient, { ApiError } from '$lib/api'; // For Google login mock/register
	import { onMount } from 'svelte';

	let currentStep = 1; // 1: Account details, 2: Profile details

	// Step 1: Account Details
	let email = '';
	let password = '';
	let confirmPassword = '';
	let userType: 'customer' | 'expert' | 'supplier' = 'customer'; // Default

	// Step 2: Profile Details (common and specific)
	let profile = {
		fullName: '',
		phoneNumber: '',
		location: '', // Common location (city/area)
		avatarUrl: '', // For simplicity, text input for URL for now

		// Expert-specific
		expertise: '',
		experience: '', // Can be used by expert & supplier

		// Supplier-specific
		companyName: '',
		category: '' // e.g., material category
	};

	let isLoading = false;
	let errorMessage: string | null = null;
	let googleIsLoading = false;

	const userTypes = [
		{ value: 'customer', label: 'Customer (Looking for services/materials)' },
		{ value: 'expert', label: 'Expert (Offering construction services)' },
		{ value: 'supplier', label: 'Supplier (Providing construction materials)' }
	];

	function handleNextStep() {
		errorMessage = null;
		if (!email.includes('@')) {
			errorMessage = 'Please enter a valid email address.';
			return;
		}
		if (password.length < 6) {
			errorMessage = 'Password must be at least 6 characters long.';
			return;
		}
		if (password !== confirmPassword) {
			errorMessage = 'Passwords do not match.';
			return;
		}
		currentStep = 2;
	}

	async function handleRegister() {
		isLoading = true;
		errorMessage = null;

		// Construct the profile object based on userType
		const finalProfile: Partial<AuthUser['profile']> = {
			fullName: profile.fullName?.trim() || undefined,
			phoneNumber: profile.phoneNumber?.trim() || undefined,
			location: profile.location?.trim() || undefined,
			avatarUrl: profile.avatarUrl?.trim() || undefined // Handle empty string as undefined
		};

		if (userType === 'expert') {
			finalProfile.expertise = profile.expertise?.trim() || undefined;
			finalProfile.experience = profile.experience?.trim() || undefined;
		} else if (userType === 'supplier') {
			finalProfile.companyName = profile.companyName?.trim() || undefined;
			finalProfile.category = profile.category?.trim() || undefined;
			finalProfile.experience = profile.experience?.trim() || undefined;
		}

		// Validate required profile fields based on userType (basic example)
		if (userType === 'expert' && !finalProfile.fullName) {
			errorMessage = 'Full name is required for Experts.';
			isLoading = false;
			return;
		}
		if (userType === 'supplier' && !finalProfile.companyName) {
			errorMessage = 'Company name is required for Suppliers.';
			isLoading = false;
			return;
		}

		const registrationData: RegisterUserData = {
			email,
			password,
			userType,
			profile: finalProfile
		};

		try {
			await authStore.register(registrationData);
			goto('/dashboard'); // Navigate to dashboard on successful registration
		} catch (error: any) {
			if (error instanceof ApiError) {
				errorMessage = error.data?.message || error.message || 'Registration failed.';
			} else {
				errorMessage = error.message || 'An unexpected error occurred during registration.';
			}
			console.error('Registration page error:', error);
		} finally {
			isLoading = false;
		}
	}

	async function handleGoogleRegister() {
		googleIsLoading = true;
		errorMessage = null;
		// For a real Google Sign-In, you'd get the token and then potentially ask for userType
		// if it's a new Google user not yet in your system.
		// Here, we use the mock flow and assume we'd get userType (e.g., from a selection prior to this button).

		// Let's assume userType is selected on the page *before* clicking Google Register
		// For simplicity of this mock, if currentStep is 1, we'll use the selected userType.
		// If on step 2, userType is already set.
		const googleUserType = userType || 'customer'; // Default to customer if somehow not set

		try {
			const mockGoogleUserData = {
				email: `guser.reg.${Date.now().toString().slice(-5)}@example.com`,
				googleId: `google.reg.${Date.now()}`,
				name: 'Google Reg User', // Will be overridden by profile.fullName if provided
				userType: googleUserType,
				profile: {
					// Provide some basic profile data for the mock
					fullName: 'Google Registered User',
					avatarUrl: '/hero/Tabby Cat Construction Worker.png', // Placeholder
					location: 'Googletown'
					// Add other fields based on googleUserType if needed for a richer mock
				}
			};

			// Backend's /api/auth/google (mock flow) handles user creation/linking.
			const response = await apiClient.googleLogin({
				mockGoogleUser: mockGoogleUserData
				// For a real flow where backend creates a *new* Google user, you might send:
				// googleTokenId: 'actual_google_token_id_from_client_sdk',
				// userTypeForNewGoogleUser: googleUserType,
				// profileForNewGoogleUser: { fullName: 'From Google', ... }
			});
			authStore._updateAuthData(response.token, response.user);
			goto('/dashboard');
		} catch (error: any) {
			if (error instanceof ApiError) {
				errorMessage = error.data?.message || error.message || 'Google registration failed.';
			} else {
				errorMessage = error.message || 'An unexpected error with Google registration.';
			}
			console.error('Google Registration page error:', error);
		} finally {
			googleIsLoading = false;
		}
	}

	// Redirect if already logged in
	let unsubscribeAuth: (() => void) | null = null;
	onMount(() => {
		unsubscribeAuth = authStore.subscribe((state) => {
			if (state.isLoggedIn && !state.isLoading) {
				goto('/dashboard', { replaceState: true });
			}
		});
		const initialAuthState = $authStore;
		if (initialAuthState.isLoggedIn && !initialAuthState.isLoading) {
			goto('/dashboard', { replaceState: true });
		}
		return () => {
			if (unsubscribeAuth) unsubscribeAuth();
		};
	});
</script>

<div
	class="flex min-h-screen flex-col items-center justify-center bg-gradient-to-br from-slate-900 via-slate-800 to-gray-900 p-4 font-sans text-gray-100"
>
	<div class="w-full max-w-lg">
		<div class="mb-8 text-center">
			<a
				href="/"
				class="text-5xl font-bold text-emerald-400 transition-colors hover:text-emerald-300"
			>
				GEFIFI
			</a>
			<h1 class="mt-2 text-2xl text-sky-300">Create Your Account</h1>
			<p class="text-sm text-slate-400">Join GEFIFI to connect with the best in construction.</p>
		</div>

		<div class="rounded-xl bg-slate-800/70 p-6 shadow-2xl sm:p-8">
			{#if errorMessage}
				<div
					class="mb-6 rounded-md border border-red-500/50 bg-red-500/25 p-3.5 text-sm text-red-200"
					role="alert"
				>
					{errorMessage}
				</div>
			{/if}

			<!-- Step Indicator -->
			<div class="mb-6 flex items-center justify-center space-x-2">
				<div class="flex items-center {currentStep >= 1 ? 'text-emerald-400' : 'text-slate-500'}">
					<div
						class="flex h-8 w-8 items-center justify-center rounded-full border-2 {currentStep >= 1
							? 'border-emerald-400 bg-emerald-500/20'
							: 'border-slate-600'}"
					>
						1
					</div>
					<span class="ml-2 text-xs sm:text-sm {currentStep >= 1 ? 'font-semibold' : ''}"
						>Account</span
					>
				</div>
				<div class="h-px flex-1 {currentStep > 1 ? 'bg-emerald-400' : 'bg-slate-600'} mx-1"></div>
				<div class="flex items-center {currentStep >= 2 ? 'text-emerald-400' : 'text-slate-500'}">
					<div
						class="flex h-8 w-8 items-center justify-center rounded-full border-2 {currentStep >= 2
							? 'border-emerald-400 bg-emerald-500/20'
							: 'border-slate-600'}"
					>
						2
					</div>
					<span class="ml-2 text-xs sm:text-sm {currentStep >= 2 ? 'font-semibold' : ''}"
						>Profile</span
					>
				</div>
			</div>

			{#if currentStep === 1}
				<form on:submit|preventDefault={handleNextStep} class="space-y-5">
					<div>
						<label for="email" class="mb-1.5 block text-sm font-medium text-sky-300"
							>Email Address <span class="text-red-400">*</span></label
						>
						<input
							type="email"
							id="email"
							bind:value={email}
							required
							disabled={isLoading || googleIsLoading}
							class="w-full rounded-lg border border-slate-600 bg-slate-700/80 px-4 py-2.5 text-gray-100 transition-colors outline-none placeholder:text-slate-400 focus:border-emerald-500 focus:ring-2 focus:ring-emerald-500"
							placeholder="you@example.com"
						/>
					</div>
					<div>
						<label for="password" class="mb-1.5 block text-sm font-medium text-sky-300"
							>Password <span class="text-red-400">*</span></label
						>
						<input
							type="password"
							id="password"
							bind:value={password}
							required
							minlength="6"
							disabled={isLoading || googleIsLoading}
							class="w-full rounded-lg border border-slate-600 bg-slate-700/80 px-4 py-2.5 text-gray-100 transition-colors outline-none placeholder:text-slate-400 focus:border-emerald-500 focus:ring-2 focus:ring-emerald-500"
							placeholder="••••••••"
						/>
					</div>
					<div>
						<label for="confirmPassword" class="mb-1.5 block text-sm font-medium text-sky-300"
							>Confirm Password <span class="text-red-400">*</span></label
						>
						<input
							type="password"
							id="confirmPassword"
							bind:value={confirmPassword}
							required
							minlength="6"
							disabled={isLoading || googleIsLoading}
							class="w-full rounded-lg border border-slate-600 bg-slate-700/80 px-4 py-2.5 text-gray-100 transition-colors outline-none placeholder:text-slate-400 focus:border-emerald-500 focus:ring-2 focus:ring-emerald-500"
							placeholder="••••••••"
						/>
					</div>
					<div>
						<label for="userType" class="mb-1.5 block text-sm font-medium text-sky-300"
							>I am a... <span class="text-red-400">*</span></label
						>
						<select
							id="userType"
							bind:value={userType}
							required
							disabled={isLoading || googleIsLoading}
							class="w-full rounded-lg border border-slate-600 bg-slate-700/80 px-4 py-2.5 text-gray-100 transition-colors outline-none focus:border-emerald-500 focus:ring-2 focus:ring-emerald-500"
						>
							{#each userTypes as typeOpt}
								<option value={typeOpt.value}>{typeOpt.label}</option>
							{/each}
						</select>
					</div>
					<button
						type="submit"
						disabled={isLoading || googleIsLoading}
						class="flex w-full items-center justify-center rounded-lg bg-emerald-500 px-6 py-3 font-semibold text-white shadow-md transition-all duration-150 ease-in-out hover:bg-emerald-600 hover:shadow-lg focus:ring-2 focus:ring-emerald-500 focus:ring-offset-2 focus:ring-offset-slate-800 focus:outline-none disabled:cursor-not-allowed disabled:opacity-60"
					>
						Next: Profile Details &rarr;
					</button>
					<div class="relative flex items-center py-2">
						<div class="flex-grow border-t border-slate-600"></div>
						<span class="mx-4 flex-shrink text-xs text-slate-400 uppercase">Or</span>
						<div class="flex-grow border-t border-slate-600"></div>
					</div>
					<button
						type="button"
						on:click={handleGoogleRegister}
						disabled={isLoading || googleIsLoading}
						class="flex w-full items-center justify-center rounded-lg bg-sky-500 px-6 py-3 font-semibold text-white shadow-md transition-all duration-150 ease-in-out hover:bg-sky-600 hover:shadow-lg focus:ring-2 focus:ring-sky-500 focus:ring-offset-2 focus:ring-offset-slate-800 focus:outline-none disabled:cursor-not-allowed disabled:opacity-60"
					>
						{#if googleIsLoading}
							<svg
								class="mr-3 -ml-1 h-5 w-5 animate-spin text-white"
								xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg"
								fill="none"
								viewBox="0 0 24 24"
								><circle
									class="opacity-25"
									cx="12"
									cy="12"
									r="10"
									stroke="currentColor"
									stroke-width="4"
								></circle><path
									class="opacity-75"
									fill="currentColor"
									d="M4 12a8 8 0 018-8V0C5.373 0 0 5.373 0 12h4zm2 5.291A7.962 7.962 0 014 12H0c0 3.042 1.135 5.824 3 7.938l3-2.647z"
								></path></svg
							>
							Processing...
						{:else}
							<svg
								class="mr-2 -ml-1 h-4 w-4"
								aria-hidden="true"
								focusable="false"
								xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg"
								viewBox="0 0 488 512"
								><path
									fill="currentColor"
									d="M488 261.8C488 403.3 391.1 504 248 504 110.8 504 0 393.2 0 256S110.8 8 248 8c66.8 0 123 24.5 166.3 64.9l-67.5 64.9C258.5 52.6 94.3 116.6 94.3 256c0 86.5 69.1 156.6 153.7 156.6 98.2 0 135-70.4 140.8-106.9H248v-85.3h236.1c2.3 12.7 3.9 24.9 3.9 41.4z"
								></path></svg
							>
							Register with Google
						{/if}
					</button>
				</form>
			{:else if currentStep === 2}
				<form on:submit|preventDefault={handleRegister} class="space-y-5">
					<h2 class="mb-1 text-center text-xl font-semibold text-sky-300">
						Complete Your Profile ({userType})
					</h2>

					<div>
						<label for="fullName" class="mb-1.5 block text-sm font-medium text-sky-300"
							>Full Name {userType !== 'supplier'
								? '<span class="text-red-400">*</span>'
								: '(Optional for Suppliers)'}</label
						>
						<input
							type="text"
							id="fullName"
							bind:value={profile.fullName}
							required={userType !== 'supplier'}
							disabled={isLoading}
							class="w-full rounded-lg border border-slate-600 bg-slate-700/80 px-4 py-2.5 text-gray-100 placeholder:text-slate-400"
							placeholder="Your full name"
						/>
					</div>

					{#if userType === 'supplier'}
						<div>
							<label for="companyName" class="mb-1.5 block text-sm font-medium text-sky-300"
								>Company Name <span class="text-red-400">*</span></label
							>
							<input
								type="text"
								id="companyName"
								bind:value={profile.companyName}
								required={userType === 'supplier'}
								disabled={isLoading}
								class="w-full rounded-lg border border-slate-600 bg-slate-700/80 px-4 py-2.5 text-gray-100 placeholder:text-slate-400"
								placeholder="Your company's official name"
							/>
						</div>
					{/if}

					<div>
						<label for="phoneNumber" class="mb-1.5 block text-sm font-medium text-sky-300"
							>Phone Number (Optional)</label
						>
						<input
							type="tel"
							id="phoneNumber"
							bind:value={profile.phoneNumber}
							disabled={isLoading}
							class="w-full rounded-lg border border-slate-600 bg-slate-700/80 px-4 py-2.5 text-gray-100 placeholder:text-slate-400"
							placeholder="e.g., +919876543210"
						/>
					</div>

					<div>
						<label for="location" class="mb-1.5 block text-sm font-medium text-sky-300"
							>Location (City/Area, Optional)</label
						>
						<input
							type="text"
							id="location"
							bind:value={profile.location}
							disabled={isLoading}
							class="w-full rounded-lg border border-slate-600 bg-slate-700/80 px-4 py-2.5 text-gray-100 placeholder:text-slate-400"
							placeholder="e.g., Bangalore, Koramangala"
						/>
					</div>

					{#if userType === 'expert'}
						<div>
							<label for="expertise" class="mb-1.5 block text-sm font-medium text-sky-300"
								>Primary Expertise (e.g., Plumbing, Electrical)</label
							>
							<input
								type="text"
								id="expertise"
								bind:value={profile.expertise}
								disabled={isLoading}
								class="w-full rounded-lg border border-slate-600 bg-slate-700/80 px-4 py-2.5 text-gray-100 placeholder:text-slate-400"
								placeholder="Your main skill"
							/>
						</div>
						<div>
							<label for="experience" class="mb-1.5 block text-sm font-medium text-sky-300"
								>Years of Experience (Optional)</label
							>
							<input
								type="text"
								id="experience"
								bind:value={profile.experience}
								disabled={isLoading}
								class="w-full rounded-lg border border-slate-600 bg-slate-700/80 px-4 py-2.5 text-gray-100 placeholder:text-slate-400"
								placeholder="e.g., 5 years, 10+ years"
							/>
						</div>
					{/if}

					{#if userType === 'supplier'}
						<div>
							<label for="category" class="mb-1.5 block text-sm font-medium text-sky-300"
								>Material Category (e.g., Cement, Steel, Tiles)</label
							>
							<input
								type="text"
								id="category"
								bind:value={profile.category}
								disabled={isLoading}
								class="w-full rounded-lg border border-slate-600 bg-slate-700/80 px-4 py-2.5 text-gray-100 placeholder:text-slate-400"
								placeholder="Main type of materials you supply"
							/>
						</div>
						<div>
							<label for="experienceSupplier" class="mb-1.5 block text-sm font-medium text-sky-300"
								>Years in Business (Optional)</label
							>
							<input
								type="text"
								id="experienceSupplier"
								bind:value={profile.experience}
								disabled={isLoading}
								class="w-full rounded-lg border border-slate-600 bg-slate-700/80 px-4 py-2.5 text-gray-100 placeholder:text-slate-400"
								placeholder="e.g., 10 years"
							/>
						</div>
					{/if}

					<!-- Avatar URL input - for simplicity for now. Real file upload is more complex here. -->
					<!-- <div>
            <label for="avatarUrl" class="block text-sm font-medium text-sky-300 mb-1.5">Profile Picture URL (Optional)</label>
            <input type="url" id="avatarUrl" bind:value={profile.avatarUrl} disabled={isLoading}
                   class="w-full bg-slate-700/80 border border-slate-600 text-gray-100 px-4 py-2.5 rounded-lg placeholder:text-slate-400" placeholder="https://example.com/avatar.jpg" />
          </div> -->

					<div class="flex flex-col gap-3 pt-3 sm:flex-row">
						<button
							type="button"
							on:click={() => (currentStep = 1)}
							disabled={isLoading}
							class="flex w-full items-center justify-center rounded-lg bg-slate-600 px-6 py-3 font-semibold text-slate-200 shadow-md transition-colors duration-150 ease-in-out hover:bg-slate-500 sm:w-auto"
						>
							&larr; Back
						</button>
						<button
							type="submit"
							disabled={isLoading}
							class="flex w-full items-center justify-center rounded-lg bg-emerald-600 px-6 py-3 font-semibold text-white shadow-md transition-all duration-150 ease-in-out hover:bg-emerald-700 hover:shadow-lg focus:ring-2 focus:ring-emerald-500 focus:ring-offset-2 focus:ring-offset-slate-800 focus:outline-none disabled:cursor-not-allowed disabled:opacity-60"
						>
							{#if isLoading}
								<svg
									class="mr-3 -ml-1 h-5 w-5 animate-spin text-white"
									xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg"
									fill="none"
									viewBox="0 0 24 24"
									><circle
										class="opacity-25"
										cx="12"
										cy="12"
										r="10"
										stroke="currentColor"
										stroke-width="4"
									></circle><path
										class="opacity-75"
										fill="currentColor"
										d="M4 12a8 8 0 018-8V0C5.373 0 0 5.373 0 12h4zm2 5.291A7.962 7.962 0 014 12H0c0 3.042 1.135 5.824 3 7.938l3-2.647z"
									></path></svg
								>
								Registering...
							{:else}
								Complete Registration
							{/if}
						</button>
					</div>
				</form>
			{/if}
		</div>

		<div class="mt-6 text-center text-sm">
			<p class="text-slate-400">
				Already have an account?
				<a
					href="/auth/login"
					class="font-medium text-emerald-400 hover:text-emerald-300 hover:underline">Login here</a
				>
			</p>
			<p class="mt-2 text-slate-500 transition-colors hover:text-slate-400">
				<a href="/" class="hover:underline">&larr; Back to Home</a>
			</p>
		</div>
	</div>
</div>

{
	"mode": "create",
	"content": "<!-- gefifi-2/src/frontend/src/routes/auth/register/+page.svelte -->\n<script lang=\"ts\">\n  import { goto } from '$app/navigation';\n  import { authStore, type RegisterUserData, type AuthUser } from '$lib/stores/auth';\n  import apiClient, { ApiError } from '$lib/api'; // For Google login mock/register\n  import { onMount } from 'svelte';\n\n  let currentStep = 1; // 1: Account details, 2: Profile details\n\n  // Step 1: Account Details\n  let email = '';\n  let password = '';\n  let confirmPassword = '';\n  let userType: 'customer' | 'expert' | 'supplier' = 'customer'; // Default\n\n  // Step 2: Profile Details (common and specific)\n  let profile = {\n    fullName: '',\n    phoneNumber: '',\n    location: '', // Common location (city/area)\n    avatarUrl: '', // For simplicity, text input for URL for now\n    \n    // Expert-specific\n    expertise: '',\n    experience: '', // Can be used by expert & supplier\n\n    // Supplier-specific\n    companyName: '',\n    category: '' // e.g., material category\n  };\n  \n  let isLoading = false;\n  let errorMessage: string | null = null;\n  let googleIsLoading = false;\n\n  const userTypes = [\n    { value: 'customer', label: 'Customer (Looking for services/materials)' },\n    { value: 'expert', label: 'Expert (Offering construction services)' },\n    { value: 'supplier', label: 'Supplier (Providing construction materials)' }\n  ];\n\n  function handleNextStep() {\n    errorMessage = null;\n    if (!email.includes('@')) {\n      errorMessage = 'Please enter a valid email address.';\n      return;\n    }\n    if (password.length < 6) {\n      errorMessage = 'Password must be at least 6 characters long.';\n      return;\n    }\n    if (password !== confirmPassword) {\n      errorMessage = 'Passwords do not match.';\n      return;\n    }\n    currentStep = 2;\n  }\n\n  async function handleRegister() {\n    isLoading = true;\n    errorMessage = null;\n\n    // Construct the profile object based on userType\n    const finalProfile: Partial<AuthUser['profile']> = {\n      fullName: profile.fullName?.trim() || undefined,\n      phoneNumber: profile.phoneNumber?.trim() || undefined,\n      location: profile.location?.trim() || undefined,\n      avatarUrl: profile.avatarUrl?.trim() || undefined, // Handle empty string as undefined\n    };\n\n    if (userType === 'expert') {\n      finalProfile.expertise = profile.expertise?.trim() || undefined;\n      finalProfile.experience = profile.experience?.trim() || undefined;\n    } else if (userType === 'supplier') {\n      finalProfile.companyName = profile.companyName?.trim() || undefined;\n      finalProfile.category = profile.category?.trim() || undefined;\n      finalProfile.experience = profile.experience?.trim() || undefined;\n    }\n    \n    // Validate required profile fields based on userType (basic example)\n    if (userType === 'expert' && !finalProfile.fullName) {\n        errorMessage = \"Full name is required for Experts.\";\n        isLoading = false;\n        return;\n    }\n     if (userType === 'supplier' && !finalProfile.companyName) {\n        errorMessage = \"Company name is required for Suppliers.\";\n        isLoading = false;\n        return;\n    }\n\n\n    const registrationData: RegisterUserData = {\n      email,\n      password,\n      userType,\n      profile: finalProfile\n    };\n\n    try {\n      await authStore.register(registrationData);\n      goto('/dashboard'); // Navigate to dashboard on successful registration\n    } catch (error: any) {\n      if (error instanceof ApiError) {\n        errorMessage = error.data?.message || error.message || 'Registration failed.';\n      } else {\n        errorMessage = error.message || 'An unexpected error occurred during registration.';\n      }\n      console.error(\"Registration page error:\", error);\n    } finally {\n      isLoading = false;\n    }\n  }\n  \n  async function handleGoogleRegister() {\n    googleIsLoading = true;\n    errorMessage = null;\n    // For a real Google Sign-In, you'd get the token and then potentially ask for userType\n    // if it's a new Google user not yet in your system.\n    // Here, we use the mock flow and assume we'd get userType (e.g., from a selection prior to this button).\n    \n    // Let's assume userType is selected on the page *before* clicking Google Register\n    // For simplicity of this mock, if currentStep is 1, we'll use the selected userType.\n    // If on step 2, userType is already set.\n    const googleUserType = userType || 'customer'; // Default to customer if somehow not set\n\n    try {\n      const mockGoogleUserData = {\n        email: `guser.reg.${Date.now().toString().slice(-5)}@example.com`,\n        googleId: `google.reg.${Date.now()}`,\n        name: 'Google Reg User', // Will be overridden by profile.fullName if provided\n        userType: googleUserType,\n        profile: { // Provide some basic profile data for the mock\n            fullName: 'Google Registered User',\n            avatarUrl: '/hero/Tabby Cat Construction Worker.png', // Placeholder\n            location: 'Googletown'\n            // Add other fields based on googleUserType if needed for a richer mock\n        }\n      };\n      \n      // Backend's /api/auth/google (mock flow) handles user creation/linking.\n      const response = await apiClient.googleLogin({ \n          mockGoogleUser: mockGoogleUserData,\n          // For a real flow where backend creates a *new* Google user, you might send:\n          // googleTokenId: 'actual_google_token_id_from_client_sdk',\n          // userTypeForNewGoogleUser: googleUserType,\n          // profileForNewGoogleUser: { fullName: 'From Google', ... } \n      });\n      authStore._updateAuthData(response.token, response.user);\n      goto('/dashboard');\n    } catch (error: any) {\n       if (error instanceof ApiError) {\n        errorMessage = error.data?.message || error.message || 'Google registration failed.';\n      } else {\n        errorMessage = error.message || 'An unexpected error with Google registration.';\n      }\n      console.error(\"Google Registration page error:\", error);\n    } finally {\n      googleIsLoading = false;\n    }\n  }\n\n  // Redirect if already logged in\n  let unsubscribeAuth: (() => void) | null = null;\n  onMount(() => {\n    unsubscribeAuth = authStore.subscribe(state => {\n      if (state.isLoggedIn && !state.isLoading) {\n        goto('/dashboard', { replaceState: true });\n      }\n    });\n    const initialAuthState = $authStore;\n    if(initialAuthState.isLoggedIn && !initialAuthState.isLoading) {\n        goto('/dashboard', { replaceState: true });\n    }\n    return () => {\n      if (unsubscribeAuth) unsubscribeAuth();\n    };\n  });\n\n</script>\n\n<div class=\"min-h-screen bg-gradient-to-br from-slate-900 via-slate-800 to-gray-900 text-gray-100 flex flex-col items-center justify-center p-4 font-sans\">\n  <div class=\"w-full max-w-lg\">\n    <div class=\"text-center mb-8\">\n      <a href=\"/\" class=\"text-5xl font-bold text-emerald-400 hover:text-emerald-300 transition-colors\">\n        GEFIFI\n      </a>\n      <h1 class=\"text-2xl text-sky-300 mt-2\">Create Your     {#if errorMessage}\n        <div class=\"p-3.5 rounded-md text-sm bg-red-500/25 text-red-200 border border-red-500/50 mb-6\" role=\"alert\">\n          {errorMessage}\n        </div>\n border border-slate-600 text-gray-100 px-4 py-2.5 rounded-lg placeholder:text-slate-400\" placeholder=\"e.g., Bangalore, Koramangala\" />\n          </div>\n          \n          {#if userType === 'expert'}\n            <div>\n              <label for=\"expertise\" class=\"block text-sm font-medium text-sky-300 mb-1.5\">Primary Expertise (e.g., Plumbing, Electrical)</label>\n              <input type=\"text\" id=\"expertise\" bind:value={profile.expertise} disabled={isLoading}\n                     class=\"w-full bg-slate-700/80 border border-slate-600 text-gray-100 px-4 py-2.5 ```diff
@@ -1,0 +1,346 @@
+<!-- gefifi-2/src/frontend/src/routes/auth/register/+page.svelte -->
+<script lang="ts">
+  import { goto } from '$app/navigation';
+  import { authStore, type RegisterUserData, type AuthUser } from '$lib/stores/auth';
+  import apiClient, { ApiError } from '$lib/api'; // For Google login mock/register
+  import { onMount, SvelteComponent } from 'svelte';
+
+  let currentStep = 1; // 1: Account details, 2: Profile details
+
+  // Step 1: Account Details
+  let email = '';
+  let password = '';
+  let confirmPassword = '';
+  let userType: 'customer' | 'expert' | 'supplier' = 'customer'; // Default
+
+  // Step 2: Profile Details (common and specific)
+  let profile = {
+    fullName: '',
+    phoneNumber: '',
+    location: '', // Common location (city/area)
+    avatarUrl: '', // For simplicity, text input for URL for now
+
+    // Expert-specific
+    expertise: '',
+    experience: '', // Can be used by expert & supplier
+
+    // Supplier-specific
+    companyName: '',
+    category: '' // e.g., material category
+  };
+
+  let isLoading = false;
+  let errorMessage: string | null = null;
+  let googleIsLoading = false;
+
+  const userTypes = [
+    { value: 'customer' as const, label: 'Customer (Looking for services/materials)' },
+    { value: 'expert' as const, label: 'Expert (Offering construction services)' },
+    { value: 'supplier' as const, label: 'Supplier (Providing construction materials)' }
+  ];
+
+  function handleNextStep() {
+    errorMessage = null;
+    if (!email.includes('@') || email.trim().length < 5) {
+      errorMessage = 'Please enter a valid email address.';
+      return;
+    }
+    if (password.length < 6) {
+      errorMessage = 'Password must be at least 6 characters long.';
+      return;
+    }
+    if (password !== confirmPassword) {
+      errorMessage = 'Passwords do not match.';
+      return;
+    }
+    currentStep = 2;
+  }
+
+  async function handleRegister() {
+    isLoading = true;
+    errorMessage = null;
+
+    const finalProfile: Partial<AuthUser['profile']> = {
+      fullName: profile.fullName?.trim() || undefined,
+      phoneNumber: profile.phoneNumber?.trim() || undefined,
+      location: profile.location?.trim() || undefined,
+      // For avatar, if we implement file upload for registration, this would be handled differently.
+      // For now, if a URL is manually entered, it's passed.
+      avatarUrl: profile.avatarUrl?.trim() || undefined,
+    };
+
+    if (userType === 'expert') {
+      finalProfile.expertise = profile.expertise?.trim() || undefined;
+      finalProfile.experience = profile.experience?.trim() || undefined;
+      if (!finalProfile.fullName) { // Basic validation
+        errorMessage = "Full name is required for Experts.";
+        isLoading = false;
+        return;
+      }
+    } else if (userType === 'supplier') {
+      finalProfile.companyName = profile.companyName?.trim() || undefined;
+      finalProfile.category = profile.category?.trim() || undefined;
+      finalProfile.experience = profile.experience?.trim() || undefined;
+      if (!finalProfile.companyName) { // Basic validation
+        errorMessage = "Company name is required for Suppliers.";
+        isLoading = false;
+        return;
+      }
+    }
+
+    const registrationData: RegisterUserData = {
+      email,
+      password,
+      userType,
+      profile: finalProfile
+    };
+
+    try {
+      await authStore.register(registrationData);
+      goto('/dashboard');
+    } catch (error: any) {
+      errorMessage = error.message || 'An unexpected error occurred during registration.';
+      console.error("Registration page error:", error);
+    } finally {
+      isLoading = false;
+    }
+  }
+
+  async function handleGoogleRegister() {
+    googleIsLoading = true;
+    errorMessage = null;
+
+    const googleUserType = userType || 'customer';
+
+    try {
+      const mockGoogleUserData = {
+        email: `guser.reg.${Date.now().toString().slice(-6)}@example.com`,
+        googleId: `google.reg.${Date.now()}`,
+        name: 'Google Reg User',
+        userType: googleUserType,
+        profile: {
+            fullName: 'Google Registered User',
+            avatarUrl: '/hero/Tabby Cat Construction Worker.png',
+            location: 'Googletown'
+        }
+      };
+
+      const response = await apiClient.googleLogin({
+          mockGoogleUser: mockGoogleUserData,
+      });
+      authStore._updateAuthData(response.token, response.user);
+      goto('/dashboard');
+    } catch (error: any) {
+       if (error instanceof ApiError) {
+        errorMessage = error.data?.message || error.message || 'Google registration failed.';
+      } else {
+        errorMessage = error.message || 'An unexpected error with Google registration.';
+      }
+      console.error("Google Registration page error:", error);
+    } finally {
+      googleIsLoading = false;
+    }
+  }
+
+  let unsubscribeAuth: (() => void) | null = null;
+  onMount(() => {
+    const initialAuthState = $authStore;
+    if(initialAuthState.isLoggedIn && !initialAuthState.isLoading) {
+        goto('/dashboard', { replaceState: true });
+    }
+    unsubscribeAuth = authStore.subscribe(state => {
+      if (state.isLoggedIn && !state.isLoading) {
+        goto('/dashboard', { replaceState: true });
+      }
+    });
+    return () => {
+      if (unsubscribeAuth) unsubscribeAuth();
+    };
+  });
+

+                   class="w-full bg-slate-700/80 border border-slate-600 text-gray-100 px-4 py-2.5 rounded-lg focus:ring-2 focus:ring-emerald-500 focus:border-emerald-500 outline-none transition-colors placeholder:text-slate-400"

true;\n    errorMessage = null;\n\n    const finalProfile: Partial<AuthUser['profile']> = {\n      fullName: profile.fullName?.trim() || undefined,\n      phoneNumber: profile.phoneNumber?.trim() ||   password,\n      userType,\n      profile: finalProfile\n    };\n\n    try {\n      await authStore.register(registrationData);\n      goto('/dashboard'); \n    } catch (error: any) {\n      errorMessage = error.message || 'An unexpected error occurred during registration.';\n      console.error(\"Registration page error:\", error);\n    } finally {\n      isLoading = false;\n    }\n  }\n    <div>\n            <label for=\"location\" class=\"block text-sm font-medium text-sky-300 mb-1.5\">Primary Location (City/Area, Optional)</label>\n            <input type=\"text\" id=\"location\" 		"raw_edits": "```svelte\n<!-- gefifi-2/src/frontend/src/routes/auth/register/+page.svelte -->\n<script lang=\"ts\">\n  import { goto } from '$app/navigation';\n  import { authStore, type RegisterUserData, type AuthUser } from '$lib/stores/auth';\n  import apiClient, { ApiError } from '$lib/api'; // For Google login mock/register\n  import { onMount, SvelteComponent } from 'svelte';\n\n  let currentStep = 1; // 1: Account details, 2: Profile details\n\n  // Step 1: Account Details\n  let email = '';\n  let password = '';\n  let confirmPassword = '';\n  let userType: 'customer' | 'expert' | 'supplier' = 'customer'; // Default\n\n  // Step 2: Profile Details (common and specific)\n  let profile = {\n    fullName: '',\n    phoneNumber: '',\n    location: '', // Common location (city/area)\n    avatarUrl: '', // For simplicity, text input for URL for now\n    \n    // Expert-specific\n    expertise: '',\n    experience: '', // Can be used by expert & supplier\n\n    // Supplier-specific\n    companyName: '',\n    category: '' // e.g., material category\n  };\n  \n  let isLoading = false;\n  let errorMessage: string | null = null;\n  let googleIsLoading = false;\n\n  const userTypes = [\n    { value: 'customer' as const, label: 'Customer (Looking for services/materials)' },\n    { value: 'expert' as const, label: 'Expert (Offering construction services)' },\n    { value: 'supplier' as const, label: 'Supplier (Providing construction materials)' }\n  ];\n\n  function handleNextStep() {\n    errorMessage = null;\n    if (!email.includes('@') || email.trim().length < 5) {\n      errorMessage = 'Please enter a valid email address.';\n      return;\n    }\n    if (password.length < 6) {\n      errorMessage = 'Password must be at least 6 characters long.';\n      return;\n    }\n    if (password !== confirmPassword) {\n      errorMessage = 'Passwords do not match.';\n      return;\n    }\n    currentStep = 2;\n  }\n\n  async function handleRegister() {\n    isLoading = true;\n    errorMessage = null;\n\n    const finalProfile: Partial<AuthUser['profile']> = {\n      fullName: profile.fullName?.trim() || undefined,\n      phoneNumber: profile.phoneNumber?.trim() || undefined,\n      location: profile.location?.trim() || undefined,\n      // For avatar, if we implement file upload for registration, this would be handled differently.\n      // For now, if a URL is manually entered, it's passed.\n      avatarUrl: profile.avatarUrl?.trim() || undefined,\n    };\n\n    if (userType === 'expert') {\n      finalProfile.expertise = profile.expertise?.trim() || undefined;\n      finalProfile.experience = profile.experience?.trim() || undefined;\n      if (!finalProfile.fullName) { // Basic validation\n        errorMessage = \"Full name is required for Experts.\";\n        isLoading = false;\n        return;\n      }\n    } else if (userType === 'supplier') {\n      finalProfile.companyName = profile.companyName?.trim() || undefined;\n      finalProfile.category = profile.category?.trim() || undefined;\n      finalProfile.experience = profile.experience?.trim() || undefined;\n      if (!finalProfile.companyName) { // Basic validation\n        errorMessage = \"Company name is required for Suppliers.\";\n        isLoading = false;\n        return;\n      }\n    }\n    \n    const registrationData: RegisterUserData = {\n      email,\n      password,\n      userType,\n      profile: finalProfile\n    };\n\n    try {\n      await authStore.register(registrationData);\n      goto('/dashboard'); \n    } catch (error: any) {\n      errorMessage = error.message || 'An unexpected error occurred during registration.';\n      console.error(\"Registration page error:\", error);\n    } finally {\n      isLoading = false;\n    }\n  }\n  \n  async function handleGoogleRegister() {\n    googleIsLoading = true;\n    errorMessage = null;\n    \n    const googleUserType = userType || 'customer'; \n\n    try {\n      const mockGoogleUserData = {\n        email: `guser.reg.${Date.now().toString().slice(-6)}@example.com`,\n        googleId: `google.reg.${Date.now()}`,\n        name: 'Google Reg User', \n        userType: googleUserType,\n        profile: { \n            fullName: 'Google Registered User',\n            avatarUrl: '/hero/Tabby Cat Construction Worker.png', \n            location: 'Googletown'\n        }\n      };\n      \n      const response = await apiClient.googleLogin({ \n          mockGoogleUser: mockGoogleUserData,\n      });\n      authStore._updateAuthData(response.token, response.user);\n      goto('/dashboard');\n    } catch (error: any) {\n       if (error instanceof ApiError) {\n        errorMessage = error.data?.message || error.message || 'Google registration failed.';\n      } else {\n        errorMessage = error.message || 'An unexpected error with Google registration.';\n      }\n      console.error(\"Google Registration page error:\", error);\n    } finally {\n      googleIsLoading = false;\n    }\n  }\n\n  let unsubscribeAuth: (() => void) | null = null;\n  onMount(() => {\n    const initialAuthState = $authStore;\n    if(initialAuthState.isLoggedIn && !initialAuthState.isLoading) {\n        goto('/dashboard', { replaceState: true });\n    }\n    unsubscribeAuth = authStore.subscribe(state => {\n      if (state.isLoggedIn && !state.isLoading) {\n        goto('/dashboard', { replaceState: true });\n      }\n    });\n    return () => {\n      if (unsubscribeAuth) unsubscribeAuth();\n    };\n  });\n\n</script>\n\n<div class=\"min-h-screen bg-gradient-to-br from-slate-900 via-slate-800 to-gray-900 text-gray-100 flex flex-col items-center justify-center p-4 font-sans\">\n  <div class=\"w-full max-w-lg\">\n    <div class=\"text-center mb-6 sm:mb-8\">\n      <a href=\"/\" class=\"text-5xl font-bold text-emerald-400 hover:text-emerald-300 transition-colors\">\n        GEFIFI\n      </a>\n      <h1 class=\"text-2xl text-sky-300 mt-2\">Create Your Account</h1>\n      <p class=\"text-slate-400 text-sm\">Join GEFIFI to connect with the best in construction.</p>\n    </div>\n\n    <div class=\"bg-slate-800/70 shadow-2xl rounded-xl p-6 sm:p-8\">\n      {#if errorMessage}\n        <div class=\"p-3.5 rounded-md text-sm bg-red-500/25 text-red-200 border border-red-500/50 mb-6\" role=\"alert\">\n          {errorMessage}\n        </div>\n      {/if}\n\n      <div class=\"mb-6 flex justify-center items-center space-x-2\">\n        <button \n          class=\"flex items-center {currentStep === 1 ? 'text-emerald-300' : 'text-slate-400 hover:text-slate-200'}\"\n          on:click={() => currentStep = 1}\n          disabled={isLoading || googleIsLoading}\n          aria-current={currentStep === 1 ? 'step' : undefined}\n        >\n          <span class=\"rounded-full w-8 h-8 flex items-center justify-center border-2 {currentStep === 1 ? 'border-emerald-400 bg-emerald-500/20' : 'border-slate-600 group-hover:border-slate-400'}\">1</span>\n          <span class=\"ml-2 text-xs sm:text-sm {currentStep === 1 ? 'font-semibold' : ''}\">Account</span>\n        </button>\n        <div class=\"flex-1 h-px {currentStep > 1 ? 'bg-emerald-400' : 'bg-slate-600'} mx-1\"></div>\n        <button \n          class=\"flex items-center {currentStep === 2 ? 'text-emerald-300' : 'text-slate-400 hover:text-slate-200'}\"\n          on:click={() => { if(currentStep === 1) handleNextStep(); else currentStep = 2;}}\n          disabled={isLoading || googleIsLoading || (currentStep === 1 && (!email || !password || !confirmPassword))}\n          aria-current={currentStep === 2 ? 'step' : undefined}\n        >\n          <span class=\"rounded-full w-8 h-8 flex items-center justify-center border-2 {currentStep === 2 ? 'border-emerald-400 bg-emerald-500/20' : 'border-slate-600 group-hover:border-slate-400'}\">2</span>\n          <span class=\"ml-2 text-xs sm:text-sm {currentStep === 2 ? ## Agent

The Registration page component `gefifi-2/src/frontend/src/routes/auth/register/+page.svelte` has been created. This component includes a multi-step form for account and profile details, varying fields based on user type, and integration with the `authStore` for making the registration call. It also includes a (mocked) Google registration option.

I acknowledge the change in `backend/package.json`; this is likely the `multer` version update and does not impact the current frontend work.

**Summary of Frontend Authentication Setup:**

1.  **Auth Store (`$lib/stores/auth.ts`)**: Manages user state, token, and provides `login`, `register`, `logout` actions using the API client.
2.  **API Client (`$lib/api.ts`)**: Handles all communication with the backend, including attaching auth tokens.
3.  **Login Page (`/auth/login/+page.svelte`)**: Form for email/password and Google (mock) login.
4.  **Registration Page (`/auth/register/+page.svelte`)**: Multi-step form for email/password registration, allowing selection of user type and collection of basic profile information. Also includes a Google (mock) registration option.

**Next Steps for Frontend:**

1.  **Connect `(app)/+layout.svelte` to the Real Auth Store**:

    - Currently, `(app)/+layout.svelte` uses a mock user. We need to update it to subscribe to the real `authStore` to display actual user information and control navigation links based on the logged-in user's `userType`.
    - The `onMount` logic in `(app)/+layout.svelte` that sets up `currentUserStore` with the mock should be replaced with a subscription to the actual `authStore`.

2.  **Implement Route Guards (Hooks)**:

    - Create a `hooks.client.ts` (or `hooks.server.ts` if you prefer server-side checks first) to protect routes within the `(app)` group.
    - This hook will check `authStore.isLoggedIn` and redirect to `/auth/login` if the user tries to access an app route without being authenticated.
    - It should also redirect already logged-in users away from `/auth/login` and `/auth/register` pages to `/dashboard`.

3.  **Test the Authentication Flow**:

    - Register a new user.
    - Log out.
    - Log in with the registered user.
    - Verify that the `(app)/+layout.svelte` displays correct user info and navigation.
    - Verify that accessing app routes when logged out redirects to login.
    - Verify that accessing login/register when logged in redirects to the dashboard.

4.  **Refine Profile Data in Registration**:
    - The registration form currently collects basic profile info. You might want to add more specific fields or even a dedicated profile editing page post-registration.
    - Consider how avatar uploads would integrate into the registration or profile update flow. (Currently, `profile.avatarUrl` in the registration form is a text input for a URL).

Let's proceed with **Step 1: Connecting `(app)/+layout.svelte` to the real `authStore`**.

<script lang="ts">
  import { page } from '$app/stores';
  import { onMount, SvelteComponent } from 'svelte';
  // import { authStore, type UserStoreData } from '$lib/stores/auth'; // We'll create this store later
  // import { goto } from '$app/navigation';

  // Placeholder for auth store - replace with actual store import later
  interface UserStoreData {
    isLoggedIn: boolean;
    id?: string;
    fullName?: string;
    email?: string;
    userType?: 'customer' | 'expert' | 'supplier' | null;
    avatarUrl?: string;
  }

  let currentUserStore: UserStoreData = {
    isLoggedIn: false, // Default to false, update onMount from a mock or real store
    id: '',
    fullName: 'Guest User',
    email: '',
    userType: null,
    avatarUrl: '/default-avatar.png' // Ensure you have a default-avatar.png in static folder
  };

  // Mocking authStore behavior for now
  const mockAuthStore = {
    subscribe: (run: (value: UserStoreData) => void, invalidate?: any) => {
      // Simulate a logged-in user for layout purposes
      const simulatedUser: UserStoreData = {
        isLoggedIn: true,
        id: 'user123',
        fullName: 'Ramesh Kumar',
        email: 'ramesh@gefifi.com',
        userType: 'customer', // Change to 'expert' or 'supplier' to test nav links
        // Using one of the existing cat images as a placeholder avatar
        avatarUrl: '/hero/Tabby Cat Construction Worker.png' 
      };
      currentUserStore = simulatedUser; // Update the reactive variable
      run(simulatedUser);
      return () => {}; // Unsubscribe function
    },
    logout: () => {
      console.log('Logging out...');
      currentUserStore = { isLoggedIn: false, id: '', fullName: 'Guest', userType: null, email: '' };
      // goto('/auth/login'); // Uncomment when authStore is real and goto is imported
    }
  };
  
  onMount(() => {
      // When using the real authStore:
      // const unsubscribe = authStore.subscribe(value => {
      //   currentUserStore = value;
      // });
      // return unsubscribe;

      // For mock store:
      mockAuthStore.subscribe(user => {
          currentUserStore = user; // This ensures the view updates if the mock changes
      });
  });


  interface NavLink {
    href: string;
    label: string;
    iconKey: keyof typeof icons; // Use keyof to ensure icon exists
    types: Array<UserStoreData['userType'] | 'all'>;
  }

  const navLinks: NavLink[] = [
    { href: '/dashboard', label: 'Dashboard', iconKey: 'dashboard', types: ['all'] },
    { href: '/chat', label: 'Chat', iconKey: 'chat', types: ['all'] },
    { href: '/contracts', label: 'Contracts', iconKey: 'contracts', types: ['all'] },
    { href: '/customer/create-request', label: 'New Request', iconKey: 'newRequest', types: ['customer'] },
  ];

  function handleLogout() {
    mockAuthStore.logout();
  }

  let sidebarOpen = false;

  const icons = {
    dashboard: `<svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" fill="none" viewBox="0 0 24 24" stroke-width="1.5" stroke="currentColor" class="w-5 h-5"><path stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round" d="M3.75 6A2.25 2.25 0 016 3.75h2.25A2.25 2.25 0 0110.5 6v2.25a2.25 2.25 0 01-2.25 2.25H6a2.25 2.25 0 01-2.25-2.25V6zM3.75 15.75A2.25 2.25 0 016 13.5h2.25a2.25 2.25 0 012.25 2.25V18a2.25 2.25 0 01-2.25 2.25H6a2.25 2.25 0 01-2.25-2.25v-2.25zM13.5 6a2.25 2.25 0 012.25-2.25H18A2.25 2.25 0 0120.25 6v2.25A2.25 2.25 0 0118 10.5h-2.25A2.25 2.25 0 0113.5 8.25V6zM13.5 15.75a2.25 2.25 0 012.25-2.25H18a2.25 2.25 0 012.25 2.25V18A2.25 2.25 0 0118 20.25h-2.25A2.25 2.25 0 0113.5 18v-2.25z" /></svg>`,
    chat: `<svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" fill="none" viewBox="0 0 24 24" stroke-width="1.5" stroke="currentColor" class="w-5 h-5"><path stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round" d="M20.25 8.511c.884.284 1.5 1.128 1.5 2.097v4.286c0 1.136-.847 2.1-1.98 2.193-.34.027-.68.052-1.02.072v3.091l-3.697-3.697c-.024-.024-.047-.048-.072-.071a11.91 11.91 0 01-6.185-1.347M16.5 9.75L9 14.25m7.5-4.5l-7.5 4.5M3.75 8.511c-.884.284-1.5 1.128-1.5 2.097v4.286c0 1.136.847 2.1 1.98 2.193.34.027.68.052 1.02.072v3.091l3.697-3.697c.024-.024.047-.048-.072-.071a11.91 11.91 0 016.185-1.347m0-2.489c.331 0 .658.025.973.069a11.909 11.909 0 00-9.054-3.996c-1.756 0-3.404.44-4.84 1.206a11.892 11.892 0 00-6.184 3.99V10.5a2.25 2.25 0 012.25-2.25h13.5A2.25 2.25 0 0020.25 6v1.5a2.25 2.25 0 00-2.25 2.25H15m-1.5-1.5l-7.5 4.5" /></svg>`,
    contracts: `<svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" fill="none" viewBox="0 0 24 24" stroke-width="1.5" stroke="currentColor" class="w-5 h-5"><path stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round" d="M19.5 14.25v-2.625a3.375 3.375 0 00-3.375-3.375h-1.5A1.125 1.125 0 0113.5 7.125v-1.5a3.375 3.375 0 00-3.375-3.375H8.25m0 12.75h7.5m-7.5 3H12M10.5 2.25H5.625c-.621 0-1.125.504-1.125 1.125v17.25c0 .621.504 1.125 1.125 1.125h12.75c.621 0 1.125-.504 1.125-1.125V11.25a9 9 0 00-9-9z" /></svg>`,
    newRequest: `<svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" fill="none" viewBox="0 0 24 24" stroke-width="1.5" stroke="currentColor" class="w-5 h-5"><path stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round" d="M12 9v6m3-3H9m12 0a9 9 0 11-18 0 9 9 0 0118 0z" /></svg>`,
    logout: `<svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" fill="none" viewBox="0 0 24 24" stroke-width="1.5" stroke="currentColor" class="w-5 h-5"><path stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round" d="M15.75 9V5.25A2.25 2.25 0 0013.5 3h-6a2.25 2.25 0 00-2.25 2.25v13.5A2.25 2.25 0 007.5 21h6a2.25 2.25 0 002.25-2.25V15M12 9l-3 3m0 0l3 3m-3-3h12.75" /></svg>`,
    menu: `<svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" fill="none" viewBox="0 0 24 24" stroke-width="1.5" stroke="currentColor" class="w-6 h-6"><path stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round" d="M3.75 6.75h16.5M3.75 12h16.5m-16.5 5.25h16.5" /></svg>`,
    close: `<svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" fill="none" viewBox="0 0 24 24" stroke-width="1.5" stroke="currentColor" class="w-6 h-6"><path stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round" d="M6 18L18 6M6 6l12 12" /></svg>`
  };

  $: filteredNavLinks = navLinks.filter(link => 
    link.types.includes('all') || (currentUserStore?.userType && link.types.includes(currentUserStore.userType))
  );

  let { children } = $props(); // Svelte 4 equivalent for <slot /> with props

</script>

<div class="flex h-screen bg-slate-800 text-gray-100 font-sans">
  <!-- Sidebar -->
  <aside class:translate-x-0={sidebarOpen} class:!-translate-x-full={!sidebarOpen}
         class="fixed inset-y-0 left-0 z-30 w-64 bg-slate-900 shadow-lg transform md:relative md:translate-x-0 transition-transform duration-300 ease-in-out flex flex-col">
    <!-- Logo -->
    <div class="h-20 flex items-center justify-center px-4 border-b border-slate-700/50 shrink-0">
      <a href="/dashboard" class="text-3xl font-bold text-emerald-400 hover:text-emerald-300 transition-colors">
        GEFIFI
      </a>
    </div>

    <!-- Navigation Links -->
    <nav class="flex-grow p-4 space-y-2 overflow-y-auto">
      {#each filteredNavLinks as link}
        <a
          href={link.href}
          class="flex items-center space-x-3 px-3 py-2.5 rounded-lg transition-colors duration-150 ease-in-out group
                 {$page.url.pathname.startsWith(link.href) && (link.href !== '/dashboard' || $page.url.pathname === '/dashboard')
                   ? 'bg-emerald-600 text-white shadow-md'
                   : 'text-slate-300 hover:bg-slate-700/50 hover:text-emerald-300'}"
          on:click={() => sidebarOpen = false}
          title={link.label}
        >
          {@html icons[link.iconKey]}
          <span class="truncate">{link.label}</span>
        </a>
      {/each}
    </nav>

    <!-- User Profile / Logout -->
    <div class="p-4 border-t border-slate-700/50 shrink-0">
      {#if currentUserStore?.isLoggedIn}
        <div class="flex items-center mb-3">
          <img
            src={currentUserStore.avatarUrl || '/default-avatar.png'}
            alt={currentUserStore.fullName || 'User Avatar'}
            class="w-10 h-10 rounded-full object-cover border-2 border-emerald-500 mr-3 shrink-0"
          />
          <div class="overflow-hidden">
            <p class="font-semibold text-sm text-white truncate" title={currentUserStore.fullName}>{currentUserStore.fullName || 'User'}</p>
            <p class="text-xs text-slate-400 truncate" title={currentUserStore.email}>{currentUserStore.email || 'No email'}</p>
            <p class="text-xs text-amber-400 capitalize">{currentUserStore.userType || 'N/A'}</p>
          </div>
        </div>
        <button
          on:click={handleLogout}
          class="w-full flex items-center justify-center space-x-2 bg-red-600 hover:bg-red-700 text-white text-sm font-medium py-2 px-3 rounded-lg transition-colors duration-150 ease-in-out"
        >
          {@html icons.logout}
          <span>Logout</span>
        </button>
      {:else}
        <a href="/auth/login" class="block w-full text-center bg-emerald-500 hover:bg-emerald-600 text-white py-2 px-4 rounded-lg">
          Login to Continue
        </a>
      {/if}
    </div>

  </aside>

  <!-- Main Content Area -->
  <div class="flex-1 flex flex-col overflow-hidden">
    <!-- Mobile Header (for menu toggle) -->
    <header class="md:hidden bg-slate-900 shadow-md p-4 flex justify-between items-center sticky top-0 z-20 h-16 shrink-0">
      <a href="/dashboard" class="text-xl font-bold text-emerald-400">GEFIFI</a>
      <button on:click={() => sidebarOpen = !sidebarOpen} class="text-slate-300 hover:text-emerald-400 p-2 -mr-2">
        {#if sidebarOpen}
            {@html icons.close}
        {:else}
            {@html icons.menu}
        {/if}
      </button>
    </header>

    <!-- Page Content Slot -->
    <main class="flex-1 overflow-x-hidden overflow-y-auto bg-slate-800 p-4 sm:p-6 lg:p-8">
      {#if currentUserStore?.isLoggedIn}
        {@render children()}
      {:else}
        <!-- Fallback content if user is not logged in (proper route guards are preferred) -->
        <div class="flex flex-col items-center justify-center h-full">
            <p class="text-xl text-slate-300 mb-4">Please log in to access this section.</p>
            <a href="/auth/login" class="bg-emerald-500 hover:bg-emerald-600 text-white font-semibold px-6 py-2 rounded-lg">
              Login
            </a>
        </div>
      {/if}
    </main>

  </div>
</div>

**Changes to be made in `gefifi-2/src/frontend/src/routes/(app)/+layout.svelte`:**

1.  **Remove Mock Store**: Delete `mockAuthStore` and the local `currentUserStore` initialization that uses the mock.
2.  **Import Real Store**: Import `authStore` and the `AuthUser` type from `'$lib/stores/auth'`.
3.  **Subscribe to Store**: Use `$: currentAuth = $authStore;` to get reactive updates from the store. The template will then use `currentAuth.isLoggedIn` and `currentAuth.user?.fullName`, etc.
4.  **Update `handleLogout`**: Change `mockAuthStore.logout()` to `authStore.logout()`.
5.  **Update Navigation Links**: Ensure `filteredNavLinks` logic correctly uses `currentAuth.user?.userType`.
6.  **Update Type Definitions**: The local `UserStoreData` can be removed or replaced by using `AuthUser` and `AuthState` (if needed for typing `currentAuth`).

```svelte
<!-- gefifi-2/src/frontend/src/routes/(app)/+layout.svelte -->
<script lang="ts">
	import { page } from '$app/stores';
	import { goto } from '$app/navigation'; // For redirecting on logout if needed
	import { authStore, type AuthUser, type AuthState } from '$lib/stores/auth'; // Import real store and types
	// SvelteComponent import is not strictly needed unless we are creating components dynamically
	// import { onMount, SvelteComponent } from 'svelte';

	// Reactive subscription to the auth store
	// currentAuth will have the shape of AuthState from our auth.ts store
	$: currentAuth = $authStore;

	interface NavLink {
		href: string;
		label: string;
		iconKey: keyof typeof icons;
		types: Array<AuthUser['userType'] | 'all'>; // Use AuthUser['userType']
	}

	const navLinks: NavLink[] = [
		{ href: '/dashboard', label: 'Dashboard', iconKey: 'dashboard', types: ['all'] },
		{ href: '/chat', label: 'Chat', iconKey: 'chat', types: ['all'] },
		{ href: '/contracts', label: 'Contracts', iconKey: 'contracts', types: ['all'] },
		{
			href: '/customer/create-request',
			label: 'New Request',
			iconKey: 'newRequest',
			types: ['customer']
		}
		// Add other links as needed, e.g., for expert/supplier specific views
		// { href: '/expert/work-feed', label: 'Work Feed', iconKey: 'feed', types: ['expert'] },
		// { href: '/supplier/material-requests', label: 'Material Requests', iconKey: 'materials', types: ['supplier'] },
	];

	async function handleLogout() {
		await authStore.logout(); // Call the real logout function
		// authStore.logout() clears localStorage and resets the store.
		// A hook or +layout.svelte logic should redirect to login if not logged in.
		// Explicit navigation can also be done here if preferred after logout.
		goto('/auth/login', { replaceState: true });
	}

	let sidebarOpen = false;

	const icons = {
		dashboard: `<svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" fill="none" viewBox="0 0 24 24" stroke-width="1.5" stroke="currentColor" class="w-5 h-5"><path stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round" d="M3.75 6A2.25 2.25 0 016 3.75h2.25A2.25 2.25 0 0110.5 6v2.25a2.25 2.25 0 01-2.25 2.25H6a2.25 2.25 0 01-2.25-2.25V6zM3.75 15.75A2.25 2.25 0 016 13.5h2.25a2.25 2.25 0 012.25 2.25V18a2.25 2.25 0 01-2.25 2.25H6a2.25 2.25 0 01-2.25-2.25v-2.25zM13.5 6a2.25 2.25 0 012.25-2.25H18A2.25 2.25 0 0120.25 6v2.25A2.25 2.25 0 0118 10.5h-2.25A2.25 2.25 0 0113.5 8.25V6zM13.5 15.75a2.25 2.25 0 012.25-2.25H18a2.25 2.25 0 012.25 2.25V18A2.25 2.25 0 0118 20.25h-2.25A2.25 2.25 0 0113.5 18v-2.25z" /></svg>`,
		chat: `<svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" fill="none" viewBox="0 0 24 24" stroke-width="1.5" stroke="currentColor" class="w-5 h-5"><path stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round" d="M20.25 8.511c.884.284 1.5 1.128 1.5 2.097v4.286c0 1.136-.847 2.1-1.98 2.193-.34.027-.68.052-1.02.072v3.091l-3.697-3.697c-.024-.024-.047-.048-.072-.071a11.91 11.91 0 01-6.185-1.347M16.5 9.75L9 14.25m7.5-4.5l-7.5 4.5M3.75 8.511c-.884.284-1.5 1.128-1.5 2.097v4.286c0 1.136.847 2.1 1.98 2.193.34.027-.68.052 1.02.072v3.091l3.697-3.697c.024-.024.047-.048-.072-.071a11.91 11.91 0 016.185-1.347m0-2.489c.331 0 .658.025.973.069a11.909 11.909 0 00-9.054-3.996c-1.756 0-3.404.44-4.84 1.206a11.892 11.892 0 00-6.184 3.99V10.5a2.25 2.25 0 012.25-2.25h13.5A2.25 2.25 0 0020.25 6v1.5a2.25 2.25 0 00-2.25 2.25H15m-1.5-1.5l-7.5 4.5" /></svg>`,
		contracts: `<svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" fill="none" viewBox="0 0 24 24" stroke-width="1.5" stroke="currentColor" class="w-5 h-5"><path stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round" d="M19.5 14.25v-2.625a3.375 3.375 0 00-3.375-3.375h-1.5A1.125 1.125 0 0113.5 7.125v-1.5a3.375 3.375 0 00-3.375-3.375H8.25m0 12.75h7.5m-7.5 3H12M10.5 2.25H5.625c-.621 0-1.125.504-1.125 1.125v17.25c0 .621.504 1.125 1.125 1.125h12.75c.621 0 1.125-.504 1.125-1.125V11.25a9 9 0 00-9-9z" /></svg>`,
		newRequest: `<svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" fill="none" viewBox="0 0 24 24" stroke-width="1.5" stroke="currentColor" class="w-5 h-5"><path stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round" d="M12 9v6m3-3H9m12 0a9 9 0 11-18 0 9 9 0 0118 0z" /></svg>`,
		logout: `<svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" fill="none" viewBox="0 0 24 24" stroke-width="1.5" stroke="currentColor" class="w-5 h-5"><path stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round" d="M15.75 9V5.25A2.25 2.25 0 0013.5 3h-6a2.25 2.25 0 00-2.25 2.25v13.5A2.25 2.25 0 007.5 21h6a2.25 2.25 0 002.25-2.25V15M12 9l-3 3m0 0l3 3m-3-3h12.75" /></svg>`,
		menu: `<svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" fill="none" viewBox="0 0 24 24" stroke-width="1.5" stroke="currentColor" class="w-6 h-6"><path stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round" d="M3.75 6.75h16.5M3.75 12h16.5m-16.5 5.25h16.5" /></svg>`,
		close: `<svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" fill="none" viewBox="0 0 24 24" stroke-width="1.5" stroke="currentColor" class="w-6 h-6"><path stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round" d="M6 18L18 6M6 6l12 12" /></svg>`
		// Example for potential new icons
		// feed: `<svg>...</svg>`,
		// materials: `<svg>...</svg>`,
	};

	$: filteredNavLinks = navLinks.filter(
		(link) =>
			link.types.includes('all') ||
			(currentAuth.user?.userType && link.types.includes(currentAuth.user.userType))
	);

	let { children } = $props();
</script>

<div class="flex h-screen bg-slate-800 font-sans text-gray-100">
	<!-- Sidebar -->
	<aside
		class:translate-x-0={sidebarOpen}
		class:!-translate-x-full={!sidebarOpen}
		class="fixed inset-y-0 left-0 z-30 flex w-64 transform flex-col bg-slate-900 shadow-lg transition-transform duration-300 ease-in-out md:relative md:translate-x-0"
	>
		<!-- Logo -->
		<div class="flex h-20 shrink-0 items-center justify-center border-b border-slate-700/50 px-4">
			<a
				href="/dashboard"
				class="text-3xl font-bold text-emerald-400 transition-colors hover:text-emerald-300"
			>
				GEFIFI
			</a>
		</div>

		<!-- Navigation Links -->
		<nav class="flex-grow space-y-2 overflow-y-auto p-4">
			{#if currentAuth.isLoading}
				<!-- Skeleton Loader for Nav -->
				{#each Array(4) as _}
					<div class="h-10 animate-pulse rounded-lg bg-slate-700/50"></div>
				{/each}
			{:else if currentAuth.isLoggedIn}
				{#each filteredNavLinks as link}
					<a
						href={link.href}
						class="group flex items-center space-x-3 rounded-lg px-3 py-2.5 transition-colors duration-150 ease-in-out
                   {$page.url.pathname.startsWith(link.href) &&
						(link.href !== '/dashboard' || $page.url.pathname === '/dashboard')
							? 'bg-emerald-600 text-white shadow-md'
							: 'text-slate-300 hover:bg-slate-700/50 hover:text-emerald-300'}"
						on:click={() => (sidebarOpen = false)}
						title={link.label}
					>
						{@html icons[link.iconKey]}
						<span class="truncate">{link.label}</span>
					</a>
				{/each}
			{/if}
		</nav>

		<!-- User Profile / Logout -->
		<div class="shrink-0 border-t border-slate-700/50 p-4">
			{#if currentAuth.isLoading}
				<div class="mb-3 flex animate-pulse items-center">
					<div class="mr-3 h-10 w-10 rounded-full bg-slate-700"></div>
					<div class="flex-1 space-y-2">
						<div class="h-3 w-3/4 rounded bg-slate-700"></div>
						<div class="h-2 w-1/2 rounded bg-slate-700"></div>
						<div class="h-2 w-1/3 rounded bg-slate-700"></div>
					</div>
				</div>
				<div class="h-9 animate-pulse rounded-lg bg-slate-700"></div>
			{:else if currentAuth.isLoggedIn && currentAuth.user}
				<div class="mb-3 flex items-center">
					<img
						src={currentAuth.user.profile?.avatarUrl || '/default-avatar.png'}
						alt={currentAuth.user.profile?.fullName || 'User Avatar'}
						class="mr-3 h-10 w-10 shrink-0 rounded-full border-2 border-emerald-500 object-cover"
						loading="lazy"
					/>
					<div class="overflow-hidden">
						<p
							class="truncate text-sm font-semibold text-white"
							title={currentAuth.user.profile?.fullName}
						>
							{currentAuth.user.profile?.fullName || currentAuth.user.email.split('@')[0]}
						</p>
						<p class="truncate text-xs text-slate-400" title={currentAuth.user.email}>
							{currentAuth.user.email}
						</p>
						<p class="text-xs text-amber-400 capitalize">{currentAuth.user.userType}</p>
					</div>
				</div>
				<button
					on:click={handleLogout}
					class="flex w-full items-center justify-center space-x-2 rounded-lg bg-red-600 px-3 py-2 text-sm font-medium text-white transition-colors duration-150 ease-in-out hover:bg-red-700"
				>
					{@html icons.logout}
					<span>Logout</span>
				</button>
			{:else}
				<a
					href="/auth/login"
					class="block w-full rounded-lg bg-emerald-500 px-4 py-2 text-center text-white hover:bg-emerald-600"
				>
					Login to Continue
				</a>
			{/if}
		</div>
	</aside>

	<!-- Main Content Area -->
	<div class="flex flex-1 flex-col overflow-hidden">
		<!-- Mobile Header (for menu toggle) -->
		<header
			class="sticky top-0 z-20 flex h-16 shrink-0 items-center justify-between bg-slate-900 p-4 shadow-md md:hidden"
		>
			<a href="/dashboard" class="text-xl font-bold text-emerald-400">GEFIFI</a>
			<button
				on:click={() => (sidebarOpen = !sidebarOpen)}
				class="-mr-2 p-2 text-slate-300 hover:text-emerald-400"
			>
				{#if sidebarOpen}
					{@html icons.close}
				{:else}
					{@html icons.menu}
				{/if}
			</button>
		</header>

		<!-- Page Content Slot -->
		<main class="flex-1 overflow-x-hidden overflow-y-auto bg-slate-800 p-4 sm:p-6 lg:p-8">
			{#if currentAuth.isLoading}
				<div class="flex h-full items-center justify-center">
					<svg
						class="h-8 w-8 animate-spin text-emerald-400"
						xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg"
						fill="none"
						viewBox="0 0 24 24"
					>
						<circle class="opacity-25" cx="12" cy="12" r="10" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="4"
						></circle>
						<path
							class="opacity-75"
							fill="currentColor"
							d="M4 12a8 8 0 018-8V0C5.373 0 0 5.373 0 12h4zm2 5.291A7.962 7.962 0 014 12H0c0 3.042 1.135 5.824 3 7.938l3-2.647z"
						></path>
					</svg>
					<span class="ml-3 text-slate-300">Loading application...</span>
				</div>
			{:else if currentAuth.isLoggedIn}
				{@render children()}
			{:else}
				<div class="flex h-full flex-col items-center justify-center text-center">
					<h2 class="mb-3 text-2xl font-semibold text-sky-300">Access Denied</h2>
					<p class="mb-6 max-w-md text-slate-300">
						It seems you're not logged in or your session might have expired. Please log in to
						access your GEFIFI dashboard and features.
					</p>
					<a
						href="/auth/login"
						class="rounded-lg bg-emerald-500 px-8 py-3 font-semibold text-white shadow-md transition-colors hover:bg-emerald-600 hover:shadow-lg"
					>
						Go to Login
					</a>
				</div>
			{/if}
		</main>
	</div>
</div>

<style lang="postcss">
	/* Optional: Global scrollbar styling for a more consistent dark theme feel */
	/* These are webkit-specific but common */
	::-webkit-scrollbar {
		width: 8px;
		height: 8px;
	}
	::-webkit-scrollbar-track {
		@apply bg-slate-800;
	}
	::-webkit-scrollbar-thumb {
		@apply rounded bg-slate-600;
	}
	::-webkit-scrollbar-thumb:hover {
		@apply bg-emerald-500;
	}
</style>

transition-transform duration-300 ease-in-out flex flex-col\">\n    <!-- Logo -->\n    <div class=\"h-20 flex items-center justify-center px-4 border-b border-slate-700/50 shrink-0\">\n      <a class=\"flex-grow p-4 space-y-2 overflow-y-auto\">\n      {#if currentAuth.isLoading && !currentAuth.isLoggedIn}\n        <!-- Skeleton Loader for Nav when initially loading and not yet logged in -->\n        {#each Array(4) as _}\n          <div class=\"h-10 bg-slate-700/50 rounded-lg animate-pulse mb-2\"></div>\n        {/each}\n      {:else if currentAuth.isLoggedIn && currentAuth.user}\n        {#each filteredNavLinks as link}\n          <a \n            href={link.href} \n            class=\"flex items-center space-x-3 px-3 py-2.5 rounded-lg transition-colors duration-150 ease-in-out group\n                   {$page.url.pathname.startsWith(link.href) && (link.href !== '/dashboard' || $page.url.pathname === '/dashboard')\n                     ? 'bg-emerald-600 text-white shadow-md' \n                     : 'text-slate-300 hover:bg-slate-700/50 hover:text-emerald-300'}\"\n            on:click={() => sidebarOpen = false}\n            title={link.label}\n          >\n            {@html icons[link.iconKey]}\n            <span class=\"truncate\">{link.label}</span>\n          </a>\n        {/each}\n      {/if}\n    </nav>\n\n    <!-- User Profile / Logout -->\n    <div class=\"p-4 border-t border-slate-700/50 shrink-0\">\n      {#if currentAuth.isLoading && !currentAuth.isLoggedIn}\n        <div class=\"flex items-center mb-3 animate-pulse\">\n          <div class=\"w-10 h-10 rounded-full bg-slate-700 mr-3\"></div>\n          <div class=\"flex-1 space-y-2\">\n            <div class=\"h-3 bg-slate-700 rounded w-3/4\"></div>\n            <div class=\"h-2 bg-slate-700 rounded w-1/2\"></div>\n             <div class=\"h-2 bg-slate-700 rounded w-1/3\"></div>\n          </div>\n        </div>\n        <div class=\"h-9 bg-slate-700 rounded-lg animate-pulse\"></div>\n      {:else if currentAuth.isLoggedIn && currentAuth.user}\n        <div class=\"flex items-center mb-3\">\n          <img \n            src={currentAuth.user.profile?.avatarUrl || '/default-avatar.png'} \n            alt={currentAuth.user.profile?.fullName || 'User Avatar'} \n            class=\"w-10 h-10 rounded-full object-cover border-2 border-emerald-500 mr-3 shrink-0\"\n            loading=\"lazy\"\n          />\n          <div class=\"overflow-hidden\">\n            <p class=\"font-semibold text-sm text-white truncate\" title={currentAuth.user.profile?.fullName}>{currentAuth.user.profile?.fullName || currentAuth.user.email.split('@')[0]}</p>\n            <p class=\"text-xs text-slate-400 truncate\" title={currentAuth.user.email}>{currentAuth.user.email}</p>\n            <p class=\"text-xs text-amber-400 capitalize\">{currentAuth.user.userType}</p>\n          </div>\n        </div>\n        <button \n          on:click={handleLogout}\n          class=\"w-full flex items-center justify-center space-x-2 bg-red-600 hover:bg-red-700 text-white text-sm font-medium py-2 px-3 rounded-lg transition-colors duration-150 ease-in-out\"\n        >\n          {@html icons.logout}\n          <span>Logout</span>\n        </button>\n      {:else}\n        <!-- This case should ideally be handled by a route guard redirecting to login -->\n        <a href=\"/auth/login\" class=\"block w-full text-center bg-emerald-500 hover:bg-emerald-600 text-white py-2 px-4 rounded-lg\">\n          Login to Continue\n        </a>\n      {/if}\n    </div>\n  </aside>\n\n  <!-- Main Content Area -->\n  <div class=\"flex-1 flex flex-col overflow-hidden\">\n    <!-- Mobile Header (for menu toggle) -->\n    <header class=\"md:hidden bg-slate-900 shadow-md p-4 flex justify-between items-center sticky top-0 z-20 h-16 shrink-0\">\n      <a href=\"/dashboard\" class=\"text-xl font-bold text-emerald-400\">GEFIFI</a>\n      <button on:click={() => sidebarOpen = !sidebarOpen} class=\"text-slate-300 hover:text-emerald-400 p-2 -mr-2\">\n        {#if sidebarOpen}\n            {@html icons.close}\n        {:else}\n            {@html icons.menu}\n        {/if}\n      </button>\n    </header>\n\n    <!-- Page Content Slot -->\n    <main class=\"flex-1 overflow-x-hidden overflow-y-auto bg-slate-800 p-4 sm:p-6 lg:p-8\">\n      {#if currentAuth.isLoading}\n         <div class=\"flex items-center justify-center h-full\">\n            <svg class=\"animate-spin h-8 w-8 text-emerald-400\" xmlns=\"http://www.w3.org/2000/svg\" fill=\"none\" viewBox=\"0 0 24 24\">\n                <circle class=\"opacity-25\" cx=\"12\" cy=\"12\" r=\"10\" stroke=\"currentColor\" stroke-width=\"4\"></circle>\n                <path class=\"opacity-75\" fill=\"currentColor\" d=\"M4 12a8 8 0 018-8V0C5.373 0 0 5.373 0 12h4zm2 5.291A7.962 7.962 0 014 12H0c0 3.042 1.135 5.824 3 7.938l3-2.647z\"></path>\n            </svg>\n            <span class=\"ml-3 text-slate-300\">Loading application state...</span>\n        </div>\n      {:else if currentAuth.isLoggedIn}\n        {@render children()}\n      {:else}\n        <!-- This content is shown if not logged in. \n             A route guard should ideally redirect to /auth/login instead of showing this in-place.\n justify-center h-full text-center\">\n            <h2 class=\"text-2xl font-semibold text-sky-300 mb-3\">Access Denied</h2>\n            <p class=\"text-slate-300 mb-6 max-w-md\">\n                It seems you're not logged in or your session might have expired. \n                Please log in to access your GEFIFI dashboard and features.\n            </p>\n            <a href=\"/auth/login\" class=\"bg-emerald-500 hover:bg-emerald-600 text-white font-semibold px-8 py-3 rounded-lg shadow-md hover:shadow-lg transition-colors\">\n              Go to Login\n            </a>\n        </div>\n      {/if}\n    </main>\n  </div>\n</div>\n\n<style lang=\"postcss\">\n  /* Optional: Global scrollbar styling for a more consistent dark theme feel */\n  /* These are webkit-specific but common */\n ## Agent

The main application layout `gefifi-2/src/frontend/src/routes/(app)/+layout.svelte` has been successfully updated to use the real `authStore`. It will now reactively display user information and filter navigation links based on the actual authentication state and user type. It also includes skeleton loaders for a better user experience while the auth state is loading.

I acknowledge the change in `backend/package.json`; this is likely still the `multer` version update and does not affect our current frontend work.

**Next Step: Implement Route Guards (Hooks)**

To properly protect the authenticated routes within the `(app)` group and to manage redirection for users who are already logged in (e.g., redirecting from `/auth/login` to `/dashboard`), we need to use SvelteKit hooks.

We'll create a `hooks.client.ts` file. This client-side hook will run before navigation and can intercept and redirect users.

**Plan for `gefifi-2/src/frontend/src/hooks.client.ts`:**

1.  **File Creation**: Create `gefifi-2/src/frontend/src/hooks.client.ts`.
2.  **Logic**:
    - Import `authStore` from `$lib/stores/auth`.
    - Import `goto` from `$app/navigation`.
    - Implement the `handle` hook.
    - Inside `handle`:
      - Get the current route ID (`event.route.id`).
      - Subscribe to `authStore` to get the current `isLoggedIn` state and `isLoading` state.
      - **Protect app routes**: If `event.route.id` starts with `/(app)` (meaning it's a route inside our protected app layout) AND the user is NOT logged in AND `authStore` is NOT loading, redirect to `/auth/login`.
      - **Redirect authenticated users from auth pages**: If `event.route.id` is `/auth/login` or `/auth/register` AND the user IS logged in AND `authStore` is NOT loading, redirect to `/dashboard`.
      - Allow navigation to proceed if no redirection conditions are met.

This hook will ensure that:

- Unauthenticated users cannot access pages like `/dashboard`, `/chat`, etc.
- Logged-in users are not shown the login/register pages again but are taken to their dashboard.

Let's create `gefifi-2/src/frontend/src/hooks.client.ts`.

**Use Tool: edit_file (edit_file-138)**

```json
{
	"display_description": "Create client-side hook for route protection",
	"content": "import { authStore } from '$lib/stores/auth';\nimport { goto } from '$app/navigation';\nimport { browser } from '$app/environment';\nimport type { HandleClientError, NavigationEvent } from '@sveltejs/kit';\nimport { get } from 'svelte/store'; // To get a one-time value from the store\n\nlet authState = get(authStore); // Get initial state\n\nauthStore.subscribe(value => {\n  authState = value; // Keep authState updated\n});\n\n/** @type {import('@sveltejs/kit').Handle} */\nexport async function handle({ event, resolve }: { event: NavigationEvent; resolve: (event: NavigationEvent, opts?: any) => Promise<any> }) {\n  if (!browser) {\n    // If on server, or prerendering, just resolve. Client-side checks are primary for this hook.\n    return resolve(event);\n  }\n\n  // Wait for the authStore to finish its initial loading from localStorage\n  // This is important to prevent premature redirects before auth status is known.\n  // A simple way is to check isLoading, but a more robust way might involve a promise or a specific store state.\n  // For now, if isLoading is true, we might delay the check or let it pass if it's the initial load.\n  \n  // If authStore is still loading its state from localStorage, we might want to avoid redirecting immediately.\n  // However, `authStore.loadUserFromStorage()` is called on module import, so by the time `handle` runs,\n  // it should have made an attempt. The `isLoading` flag in the store reflects this.\n\n  // A short delay to allow the authStore to potentially initialize from localStorage, especially on first load/navigation.\n  // This is a bit of a workaround; ideally, the store signals readiness.\n  if (authState.isLoading) {\n    await new Promise(r => setTimeout(r, 50)); // Small delay, adjust if needed\n    authState = get(authStore); // Re-fetch after potential delay\n  }\n\n  const { route } = event;\n  const isLoggedIn = authState.isLoggedIn;\n  const storeIsLoading = authState.isLoading; // Use the reactive isLoading state from the store\n\n  // Prevent navigation loops: if we are already on the target page, don't redirect.\n  // (Though SvelteKit might handle some of this, explicit checks are safer).\n\n  // console.log(`Hook: Current route: ${event.url.pathname}, Target route.id: ${route.id}, LoggedIn: ${isLoggedIn}, StoreLoading: ${storeIsLoading}`);\n\n  // If attempting to access protected app routes\n  if (route.id?.startsWith('/(app)')) {\n    if (!isLoggedIn && !storeIsLoading) {\n      // console.log('Hook: Not logged in, redirecting to /auth/login from app route');\n      if (event.url.pathname !== '/auth/login') {\n        throw await goto('/auth/login', { replaceState: true });\n      }\n    }\n  }\n\n  // If attempting to access auth pages while already logged in\n  if (route.id === '/auth/login' || route.id === '/auth/register') {\n    if (isLoggedIn && !storeIsLoading) {\n      // console.log('Hook: Already logged in, redirecting to /dashboard from auth route');\n       if (event.url.pathname !== '/dashboard') {\n        throw await goto('/dashboard', { replaceState: true });\n      }\n    }\n  }\n\n  return resolve(event);\n}\n\n/** @type {import('@sveltejs/kit').HandleClientError} */\nexport function handleError({ error, event }: { error: any, event: NavigationEvent }): void {\n  // This is a client-side error handler.\n  // You can log errors or display a generic error message to the user.\n  console.error('[Client Hook Error] Error during navigation or rendering:', error);\n  console.error('[Client Hook Error] Event details:', event);\n\n  // Example: Send to an error tracking service\n  // Sentry.captureException(error, { extra: { event } });\n\n  // Optionally, display a user-friendly message or redirect to an error page\n  // if (error.message.includes(\"Failed to fetch\")) {\n  //   alert(\"Network error. Please check your connection and try again.\");\n  // }\n}\n",
	"path": "gefifi-2/src/frontend/src/hooks.client.ts",
	"mode": "create"
}
